questions.subject: Current Affairs
questions.prompt: Which of the following statements best describes the 'NATPOLREX' exercise?

options.text: An annual joint exercise between the Indian Navy and Indian Coast Guard for coastal defense.
A biennial flagship exercise by the Indian Coast Guard to enhance response to marine oil spills.
A tri-service exercise focused on humanitarian assistance and disaster relief in the Indian Ocean.
A cybersecurity exercise conducted by the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology.

questions.explanation: NATPOLREX (National Level Pollution Response Exercise) is a biennial flagship exercise conducted by the Indian Coast Guard (ICG). Its objective is to evaluate and enhance India’s national preparedness to respond specifically to marine oil spill incidents.
questions.takeaway: NATPOLREX is the Indian Coast Guard's biennial exercise for marine oil spill response.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: The Indian Coast Guard (ICG) begins the 10th edition of the National Level Pollution Response Exercise (NATPOLREX-X). NATPOLREX is a biennial flagship exercise which aims to evaluate and enhance India’s national preparedness to respond to marine oil spill incidents.

questions.subject: Current Affairs
questions.prompt: The 'Bharat NCX 2025', recently in the news, is primarily associated with which of the following sectors?
questions.explanation: Bharat NCX stands for National Cybersecurity Exercise. It is conducted by the National Security Council Secretariat (NSCS) to enhance the nation's cybersecurity posture.
questions.takeaway: Bharat NCX is India's premier national-level exercise for cybersecurity.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: About National Cybersecurity Exercise (Bharat NCX 2025): Conducted by National Security Council Secretariat (NSCS) in collaboration with Rashtriya Raksha University (RRU).
